title: Waterdrop Fridge Water Filter Replacement for Samsung® DA29-10105J HAFEX/EXP, DA2010CB, DA99 02131B, HAIER® LG® Inline Water Filter (4)
features: Waterdrop is committed to improving water filtration technology and offering clean water.
[Fully repalcement design] Our Waterdrop replacement filters are expertly modeled to ensure they always fit your refrigerator. Enjoy the pure, natural water that makes all the difference.

[Premium carbon block] The carbon block used in our refrigerator cartridge / carbon water filter is made of pure coconut shell carbon in a “block” construction, the structural design of which offers a high contaminant-absorption rate.

[Advance filtration process] This DA29-10105J water filter replacement by Waterdrop filters off materials from your water. These include chlorine, taste and odor, and other suspended particles tested by the third-party laboratory.

[Replacement models] Samsung DA29-10105J, DA2010CB; and any other model of Samsung refrigerator using an external water filter cartridge which connects in-line with the water pipe supplying the fridge.
description: Product Description Giving you clean, great tasting water Premium coconut shell carbon filter traps contaminants in tap water Significantly improves taste, odor, and quality of water Perfectly fit the original Easy installation, no tools required Replacement for Following Models: Replacement Information The Watedrop WD-DA29-10105J is an external universal water filter cartridge with female receivers, that connects in-line via push-fit with the 1/4" water pipe that supplies the refrigerator. It s replacement for a wide range of Samsung models that use an external filter, as well as many other American style side-by-side refrigerators that have externally fitted long, slim water filters (usually located at the rear of the fridge). Change your filter every 6 months or 5300 litres, whichever comes first. Please note this is a compatible spare part and the manufacturers' names and part numbers have been used for reference purposes only. Waterdrop is an independent brand. Supreme filtration The 0.5-micron coconut-shell activated carbon block filter effectively reduce chlorine, odor and taste. Safe materials The R&D team conducts trials to ensure the filter’s compatibility. BPA-free and lead-free materials are used to give you healthy and great-tasting drinking water. International certifications The filter on which we put our name is fully certified by NSF against NSF 372, ensuring that the purified water is of a consistently high standard, thereby giving you the best water filter for fridge. Certificate C0145653, by NSF International, 2019. We cost less We are proud to have our own manufacturing line. By selling products directly from the factory. Filter’s lifespan Replace your filter every 6 months, or every 5300 liters, and enjoy the clean water you and your family deserve. Easy Replacement Precision-engineered for a perfect fit and tool-free installation, requiring no tools.
